label_notes: Discord positions itself as privacy-conscious compared to other platforms, with limited advertising and stated commitment to not selling data. However, message retention is perpetual by default, and parent company Tencent's involvement may raise questions. Network access prevented direct policy verification - this analysis is based on publicly documented practices.
